title.zh: 中国储能电池系统进入萨摩亚：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國儲能電池系統進入薩摩亞：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China battery energy storage system documentation against Samoa regulatory context — including Ministry of Commerce, Industry and Labour (MCIL) product conformity requirements, Office of the Regulator (OOTR) electricity regulatory requirements, Electric Power Corporation (EPC) grid-connection requirements, IEC 62619 and IEC 62933 international standards, NFPA 855 fire-safety installation expectations, UN 38.3 transport requirements, and the 230/400 V 50 Hz Pacific island grid context — versus China GB/T 36276, GB/T 34131, GB 38031, and GB/T 36558 baselines. Samoa is a Pacific SIDS with a high renewable-energy target, cyclone-prone coastal environment, and a conformity regime that is limited in scope; gaps are flagged honestly.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国储能电池系统文件与萨摩亚监管背景对照——包括商业、工业和劳工部（MCIL）产品合格评定要求、监管办公室（OOTR）电力监管要求、电力公司（EPC）并网要求、IEC 62619和IEC 62933国际标准、NFPA 855消防安全安装要求、UN 38.3运输要求，以及230/400 V 50 Hz太平洋岛屿电网背景——对比中国GB/T 36276、GB/T 34131、GB 38031和GB/T 36558基准的差距对照。萨摩亚是太平洋小岛发展中国家，具有高可再生能源目标、易受台风影响的沿海环境，且合格评定制度范围有限；差距均如实标注。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國儲能電池系統文件與薩摩亞監管背景對照——包括商業、工業和勞工部（MCIL）產品合格評定要求、監管辦公室（OOTR）電力監管要求、電力公司（EPC）併網要求、IEC 62619和IEC 62933國際標準、NFPA 855消防安全安裝要求、UN 38.3運輸要求，以及230/400 V 50 Hz太平洋島嶼電網背景——對比中國GB/T 36276、GB/T 34131、GB 38031和GB/T 36558基準的差距對照。薩摩亞是太平洋小島發展中國家，具有高可再生能源目標、易受颱風影響的沿海環境，且合格評定制度範圍有限；差距均如實標注。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, MCIL conformity scope determination, OOTR electricity regulatory approval, EPC grid-connection approval, dangerous-goods classification, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, designers, and installers should verify current Samoa MCIL product regulations, OOTR electricity regulatory requirements, EPC grid-connection technical specifications, NFPA fire-safety installation requirements, UN transport regulations, and project-owner requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、MCIL合格评定范围裁定、OOTR电力监管审批、EPC并网批准、危险货物分类、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、设计方和安装方在出货或安装前应与合格专业人士核验现行萨摩亚MCIL产品法规、OOTR电力监管要求、EPC并网技术规格、NFPA消防安全安装要求、UN运输法规及项目业主要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、MCIL合格評定範圍裁定、OOTR電力監管審批、EPC併網批准、危險貨物分類、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、設計方和安裝方在出貨或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗現行薩摩亞MCIL產品法規、OOTR電力監管要求、EPC併網技術規格、NFPA消防安全安裝要求、UN運輸法規及項目業主要求。

answer_first.en: Samoa does not have a dedicated mandatory BESS product safety standard or a strong standalone product conformity body. The Ministry of Commerce, Industry and Labour (MCIL) administers trade and product standards, but a specific mandatory certification regime for stationary BESS has not been confirmed from official sources. The Office of the Regulator (OOTR) regulates the electricity sector, and the Electric Power Corporation (EPC) is the sole grid operator and utility. BESS projects must obtain EPC grid-connection approval and satisfy any OOTR electricity regulatory conditions. The practical gaps for Chinese BESS exported to Samoa are: (1) IEC 62619 cell and module safety evidence as the internationally expected baseline for project and EPC acceptance; (2) IEC 62933 system-level technical requirements where referenced in EPC or project-owner specifications; (3) NFPA 855-aligned fire-safety installation documentation, as Samoa's building and fire codes reference IEC/Australian-NZ and in some contexts NFPA frameworks, and no dedicated BESS fire code has been confirmed; (4) UN 38.3 transport test documentation mandatory under international transport conventions for sea-freight via Apia port; (5) voltage mismatch — China nominal is 220/380 V whereas Samoa operates at 230/400 V 50 Hz; PCS must be re-parameterised and the difference must not be dismissed; (6) cyclone-zone structural and coastal salt-mist derating requirements for outdoor or containerised BESS enclosures. Chinese GB/T 36276, GB/T 34131, GB 38031, and GB/T 36558 represent the manufacturing baseline but are not accepted as substitutes for IEC 62619 evidence in project or authority review.
answer_first.zh: 萨摩亚没有专门的强制性BESS产品安全标准，也没有强有力的独立产品合格评定机构。商业、工业和劳工部（MCIL）负责管理贸易和产品标准，但从官方来源尚未确认固定式BESS的具体强制认证制度。监管办公室（OOTR）监管电力行业，电力公司（EPC）是唯一电网运营商和公用事业单位。BESS项目须取得EPC并网审批，并满足OOTR电力监管条件。中国BESS出口萨摩亚的实际差距包括：（1）IEC 62619电芯和模组安全证据，作为项目和EPC验收的国际预期基准；（2）EPC或项目业主规格中引用的IEC 62933系统级技术要求；（3）符合NFPA 855的消防安全安装文件，萨摩亚建筑和消防规范参考IEC/澳新框架，部分情况下参考NFPA框架，专门针对BESS的消防规范尚未确认；（4）国际运输公约强制要求的UN 38.3运输测试文件，适用于经阿皮亚港海运的货物；（5）电压不匹配——中国标称电压为220/380 V，而萨摩亚运行电压为230/400 V 50 Hz；储能变流器须重新参数配置，此差异不可忽视；（6）户外或集装箱式BESS外壳的台风区结构和沿海盐雾降额要求。中国GB/T 36276、GB/T 34131、GB 38031和GB/T 36558是生产基准，但在项目或主管机关审查中不被接受为IEC 62619证据的替代依据。
answer_first.zht: 薩摩亞沒有專門的強制性BESS產品安全標準，也沒有強有力的獨立產品合格評定機構。商業、工業和勞工部（MCIL）負責管理貿易和產品標準，但從官方來源尚未確認固定式BESS的具體強制認證制度。監管辦公室（OOTR）監管電力行業，電力公司（EPC）是唯一電網運營商和公用事業單位。BESS項目須取得EPC併網審批，並滿足OOTR電力監管條件。中國BESS出口薩摩亞的實際差距包括：（1）IEC 62619電芯和模組安全證據，作為項目和EPC驗收的國際預期基準；（2）EPC或項目業主規格中引用的IEC 62933系統級技術要求；（3）符合NFPA 855的消防安全安裝文件，薩摩亞建築和消防規範參考IEC/澳新框架，部分情況下參考NFPA框架，專門針對BESS的消防規範尚未確認；（4）國際運輸公約強制要求的UN 38.3運輸測試文件，適用於經阿皮亞港海運的貨物；（5）電壓不匹配——中國標稱電壓為220/380 V，而薩摩亞運行電壓為230/400 V 50 Hz；儲能變流器須重新參數配置，此差異不可忽視；（6）戶外或集裝箱式BESS外殼的颱風區結構和沿海鹽霧降額要求。中國GB/T 36276、GB/T 34131、GB 38031和GB/T 36558是製造基準，但在項目或主管機關審查中不被接受為IEC 62619證據的替代依據。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, grid operator, utility, customs, dangerous-goods authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
